channel.title: Naija Digest Online
channel.description: Nigeria’s one-stop hub for breaking news, tech, football, celebrity gossip, Naija music, live TV, exchange rates and trending topics.

item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description:

Read More: https://punchng.com/tinubu-flags-off-n137bn-road-rehabilitation-projects-in-borno/

item.title: Scotland make impressive start in statement away win over Argentina
item.dc:creator: Sky Sports Football
item.description: Scotland banished any lingering demons from November as they kicked off their Nations Championship with an impressive 47-38 away win over Argentina.

item.title: World Bank confirms Anambra did not apply for 2024 HOPE-Governance loan
item.dc:creator: Punch
item.description:

item.description: Bournemouth's Alex Scott wanted by Premier League quartet, Arsenal agree to sell Leandro Trossard, Manchester United's Kobbie Mainoo on Real Madrid's radar, plus more.

Through Airtel Nigeria and in partnership with the Ishk Tolaram Foundation

item.title: Ooni of Ife denies conferring chieftaincy title on Baba Ijesha
item.dc:creator: Tribune
item.description: The Ooni of Ife, Oba Adeyeye Ogunwusi, has dismissed claims that he conferred a chieftaincy title on Nollywood actor and comedian Olanrewaju Omiyinka, popularly known as Baba Ijesha. The monarch said the reports circulating on social media were false and clarified that Baba Ijesha was not installed

item.title: Cooking gas price reduction update in Nigeria
item.dc:creator: Daily Post
item.description: The prices of liquefied petroleum gas, known as cooking gas, have continued to fall across parts of Nigeria after weeks of upsurge due to supply constraints.  Checks across cooking gas retail outlets in Abuja showed that they have dropped by between N1450 and N1500 per kilogram from N1700 at AA

item.title: Interfaith Dialogue Key To Tackling Insecurity, Says Tinubu
item.dc:creator: Leadership
item.description: President Bola Ahmed Tinubu, on Saturday in Abuja, reaffirmed his administration’s commitment to prioritising interfaith dialogue and promoting peace, harmony, and tolerance among Nigeria’s diverse religious communities. The President made this statement while receiving in audience Archbishop

I see his efforts all over the world to promote world peace. We need his spiritual engagement, as millions around the world look up to him. I look forward

item.title: Gunmen kill female farmer, injure another in fresh Plateau attack

item.description: Suspected armed bandits on Saturday attacked farmers at Rinyan village in Tahoss community of Riyom Local Government Area of Plateau State, killing one woman and injuring another. item.title: Hezbollah, Hamas and Houthi officials attend funeral ceremonies for Iran's Khamenei
item.dc:creator: France 24
item.description: Tens of thousands of mourners flocked to Tehran's Grand Mosalla Mosque to pay their respects to late supreme leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei on Saturday. Among them were representatives from Hamas, Hezbollah and the Houthis of Yemen, members of the "axis of resistance" that Iran has long supported as

item.title: National single window hasn’t triggered demurrage, says NSC
item.dc:creator: Vanguard
item.description: The Nigerian Shippers' Council, NSC, has said the implementation of the National Single Window has not resulted in additional demurrage charges for shippers, despite initial concerns that the initiative could slow cargo clearance and create congestion at the nation's ports. item.title: NDC deputy chairman, others defect to PDP in Ebonyi
item.dc:creator: Tribune
item.description: In a major political realignment ahead of the 2027 general elections, no fewer than 4,000 members of the Nigeria Democratic Congress (NDC), including the Deputy Chairman, Mr. Okechukwu Idenyi, and the Secretary, Bar. Solomon Adum, in Ebonyi State have defected to the Peoples Democratic Party (PDP).

Sokoh, widely known as the Nigerian Food Explorer, clinched the 2026

item.title: FG To Reopen Borno’s Trade Corridors Through Rehabilitation Of State’s Roads
item.dc:creator: ThisDay
item.description: * Shettima: Road projects will boost commerce, post-insurgency recovery in N’east Deji Elumoye in Abuja The Federal Government on Saturday  flagged off the rehabilitation of the Bama-Banki Road and Dikwa-Gamboru-Ngala

item.title: FIFA U17 Women’s World Cup: Flamingos trounce Benin Republic in Ikenne
item.dc:creator: PM News
item.description: The Amazons equalized 11 minutes later, with Nazifatou Dangui shooting past Ijirigho after good work by Gandonou opened up the Flamingos’ defence.

item.title: Uba Sani flags off erosion control project, pays N2bn compensation
item.dc:creator: Premium Times
item.description: Governor Sani distributed cheques of about N2 billion to 1, 000 individuals whose houses will be affected. The project stretches from Rigasa to Tudun Wada wards in Igabi and Kaduna South local governments respectively The project stretches from Rigasa to Tudun Wada wards in Igabi and Kaduna South lo

item.title: Hamilton plots Ferrari teamwork to 'topple' Antonelli in British GP
item.dc:creator: Sky Sports Football
item.description: Lewis Hamilton hopes he can work together with Ferrari team-mate Charles Leclerc to "topple" Kimi Antonelli at the British Grand Prix.

item.title: Morocco reach quarter-finals as co-hosts Canada knocked out
item.dc:creator: BBC Sport Football
item.description: Canada become the first of co-hosts to exit the 2026 World Cup, after being beaten 3-0 by Morocco in Houston.

item.title: Davido Melts Hearts As Daughter Hailey Sings Along To His Song
item.dc:creator: Leadership
item.description: Afrobeats superstar David Adedeji Adeleke, popularly known as Davido, couldn’t hide his excitement after his second daughter, Hailey, was captured vibing and singing along to one of his songs. In a heartwarming video shared online, young Hailey enthusiastically mouthed the lyrics and danced to

item.title: Leopards leave Wolves licking their wounds
item.dc:creator: Sky Sports Football
item.description: Super League highlights from Hill Dickinson Stadium as Leigh Leopards took on Warrington Wolves.

item.title: Cape Verde Goalkeeper Now World’s Most Followed Goalkeeper on Instagram with Over 20m Followers
item.dc:creator: Completesports
item.description: Cape Verde goalkeeper Vozinha has skyrocketed to over 20 million Instagram followers. This was as a result of the 40-year-old’s breakout performances during the 2026 FIFA World Cup, where he helped the Blue Sharks reach the round of 16. Entering the tournament with just 50,000 followers, Vozinha gai

item.title: Paraguay-France live: Les Bleus aim to extend perfect tournament run
item.dc:creator: France 24
item.description: France continue their knockout campaign against Paraguay, looking to maintain their perfect tournament record and progress one step closer to winning another World Cup. Les Bleus' dominant group stage campaign has established them as genuine contenders, while Paraguay seek to upset the odds as they

item.title: JUST IN: Morocco Crush Canada to Reach 2026 World Cup Quarter-Finals
item.dc:creator: TVC News
item.description: Morocco booked a place in the quarter-finals of the 2026 FIFA World Cup after defeating co-hosts Canada 3-0 in their Round of 16 encounter, extending their unbeaten run in the tournament. The Atlas Lions produced another composed display to eliminate the hosts and move within one victory of matching

item.title: Venezuela Quake Death Toll Rises To 2,954 — Official Figures
item.dc:creator: Channels TV
item.description: One of Latin America's worst earthquake disasters has left more than 16,000 homeless and collapsed 190 buildings, mostly in the coastal La Guaira area north of the capital Caracas. The post Venezuela Quake Death Toll Rises To 2,954 — Official Figures appeared first on Channels Television.

item.title: Gusau felicitates Shehu Dikko as NSC boss clocks another year
item.dc:creator: PM News
item.description: The NFF has enjoyed a harmonious working relationship with the National Sports Commission since he came on board and we are happy about his keen interests and concerns about the welfare of the various National Teams. We wish him a long life in good health and sound mind.”

item.title: 1,800 Attacks, 5,700 Dead: UNHCR Warns Lake Chad Crisis Spiralling Out of Control
item.dc:creator: ThisDay
item.description: Michael Olugbode in Abuja The humanitarian crisis in the Lake Chad Basin has taken a deadly turn, with the United Nations High Commissioner for Refugees (UNHCR) revealing that nearly 1,800 security

item.title: A politically charged holiday: The US celebrates its 250th anniversary
item.dc:creator: Al Jazeera
item.description: The semiquincentennial has been meet with controversy, as President Trump seeks to exert influence over the celebration.

item.title: Fenerbahce complete deal to sign Ake from Man City
item.dc:creator: SportingLife NG
item.description: Fenerbahce have signed Netherlands defender Nathan Ake from Manchester City in a deal that could be worth up to £8.5m. The Turkish club have paid around £7m up front with the fee rising if add-ons are met. Ake, 31, made three appearances for the Netherlands in the 2026 World Cup before their elimina
